creator: gogo@cs.uni-sb.de
text:
Update sysutils/rubygem-bundler to version 0.8.1

Fix: 

Apply the patch at
http://w5.cs.uni-sb.de/~gogo/patches/rubygem-bundler-0.8.1.patch



I've updated the master site to 
http://s3.amazonaws.com/gemcutter_production/gems/
since (without modification)
http://gemcutter.org/downloads/ANYRUBYGEM-VERSION.gem
is using redirection to the s3 amazon service which is not working with the ports system!?
See
http://www.mail-archive.com/freebsd-ports@freebsd.org/msg24658.html
